content: runtime-openclaw package structure: AgentRuntime interface in interface.ts, local types in types.ts (SpawnConfig, AgentHandle, LeaseStatus, AgentStatus), adapters implement interface with name property + spawn/stop/heartbeat/isAvailable. RuntimeManager routes by name via Map. No @sisu/core dependency — only @sisu/protocol.

name: child-process-adapter
description: child_process adapter pattern: use spawnProcess from node:child_process, track processes in Map<string, {process: ChildProcess, status: AgentStatus}>, update status on spawn/error/exit events, heartbeat returns LeaseStatus with 15s heartbeatAt and 60s expiresAt, isAvailable uses spawnSync('which', [binaryName])

name: protocol-build-required
description: workspace packages depending on @sisu/protocol must build protocol first (pnpm build in packages/protocol) before tsc --noEmit succeeds — dist/ is not gitignored in worktrees but won't exist after fresh pnpm install

content: TypeScript 5.9.3 with moduleResolution:NodeNext skips 'node:child_process' imports as absolute URIs — use plain 'child_process' (without node: prefix) for imports in packages that get @types/node transitively via vitest peer dep

SpawnConfig.role should be string (role ID), not RoleDefinition object — runtime adapters only need the ID string for metadata; the full RoleDefinition object is not needed at spawn time. All SpawnConfig consumers must use role: 'roleId' strings.
